outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed near-term by positive GEX; monthly negative GEX adds tail risk
outlook.summary: Spot tests 24300 RESONANCE WALL (12 pts above). Positive GEX (1.52B) stabilizes intraday, but smirk skew and monthly negative GEX create asymmetric downside risk. Break above 24300 targets 24400-24600; rejection drives toward 24100-24147 magnet zone.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Highest Call OI across ALL THREE expirations (0DTE 265, WEEKLY 201, MONTHLY 410). Immediate resistance 12 pts above spot. Strongest structural level in the market.
0DTE gamma equilibrium point. Spot trading above = positive gamma zone. Dealers suppress volatility. Critical intraday support - breach accelerates selling.
Monthly Max Pain (0.78% below spot) near 0DTE gamma flip creates magnetic attraction zone. MM target for expiration.
Massive Put OI (597) in MONTHLY - largest single-strike put concentration. Structural support aligned with psychological level.
CONFLUENCE: Highest Put OI in both 0DTE (103) and WEEKLY (209). Deep structural support with smirk skew validation (2.05 ratio = fear pricing).
